prompt: A highly realistic professional luxury perfume advertisement featuring a handsome middle-aged man with wavy dark brown hair, wearing a sharp black suit jacket and stylish round tortoiseshell glasses. He is looking directly at the camera with a confident, slight smile, holding a sleek rectangular glass perfume bottle in his right hand, presenting it forward. The bottle has a black cap and a black label that reads "LEMLE ROYAL SPIRIT EAU DE PARFUM 50ML". Studio portrait with clean white background, dramatic soft lighting created by subtle shadows and highlights on his face and the bottle. On the right side of the image, bold modern text reads: "LEMLE" at the top, followed by "IF LUXURY HAD A SMELL THIS WOULD BE IT" in large elegant font, and a red banner below saying "BOLD. ELEGANT. UNFORGETTABLE". Cinematic lighting, high-end commercial photography style, sharp detail, 8k quality.
